final:
// // Counter decrements on each rising edge of the clock signal
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  output reg [7:0] count
);parameter MAX_COUNT = 255; // Maximum value that the counter should count to

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if(rst == 1) begin
      count <= 0;
    end
    else if(count == MAX_COUNT) begin
      count <= 0;
    end
    else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // Counter decrements on each rising edge of the clock signal
